detailed_description: This video captures the disheartening experience of receiving failing grades on school tests. It presents multiple close-up shots of graded papers, clearly displaying low scores like 16/25, 5/13, and 8/12, all circled in red or purple. A text overlay explicitly states the 'POV: that feeling when you get a failing score,' perfectly encapsulating the universal negative emotion associated with academic disappointment. The visual evidence of poor performance combined with the direct statement of feeling creates a relatable moment of frustration for viewers.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is kept as it constitutes the complete 'hero moment' of the video. It immediately presents the 'Problem_State' (failing scores) and the 'Negative_Emotion' associated with it through the explicit text overlay, which also implies a 'Face_Reaction' of disappointment. There is no setup or dead air; the core message is conveyed throughout the duration.
